caption: This is a solo piano piece in a classical style. The melody is played expressively with a grand piano sound, featuring dynamic contrasts between soft and loud passages. The atmosphere is emotional and introspective.

This is a jazz piano trio piece. A piano plays a swinging melody with walking bass and brushed drums in the background. The atmosphere is relaxed and improvisational, reminiscent of a late-night jazz club.
This is a minimalist piano composition. A single melodic line is repeated with subtle variations over sparse, widely-spaced chords. The atmosphere is meditative and calm.
This is a piano ballad with orchestral strings. The piano carries a slow, lyrical melody while lush string pads provide harmonic support. The mood is deeply emotional and cinematic.
This is an upbeat ragtime piano piece. The left hand plays a steady stride pattern while the right hand plays a syncopated, lively melody. The atmosphere is cheerful and energetic.
This is an acoustic fingerpicking folk song. A steel-string acoustic guitar plays an intricate fingerpicked melody with a warm, resonant tone. The atmosphere is intimate and nostalgic.

This is a heavy metal track featuring a distorted electric guitar. The guitar plays fast, aggressive riffs with palm-muted chugging patterns and a high-gain tone. The atmosphere is intense and powerful.
This is a classical Spanish guitar piece. A nylon-string guitar plays an expressive flamenco-inspired melody with rapid arpeggios and dynamic fingerpicking. The atmosphere is passionate and dramatic.
This is a clean electric guitar jazz piece. A hollow-body guitar plays a smooth, chord-melody arrangement with subtle reverb. The atmosphere is sophisticated and laid-back.

This is a country track with acoustic rhythm guitar. A steel-string guitar strums open chords with a steady two-beat pattern, accompanied by bass and light percussion. The atmosphere is warm and nostalgic.

This is a full orchestral piece. Strings, brass, woodwinds, and percussion all play together in a powerful, layered arrangement. The dynamics build from a quiet introduction to a massive climax. The atmosphere is epic and cinematic.

This is a rock band recording with full mix. Distorted electric guitars, bass guitar, acoustic drums, and a synthesizer all play together in a dense, energetic arrangement. The atmosphere is powerful and driving.

This is an EDM track with dense layering. Multiple synthesizer leads, pads, bass, and programmed drums are stacked together. The arrangement builds through a filtered intro, drop, and breakdown. The atmosphere is euphoric and intense.

This is a hip-hop beat with a dense sample-based mix. A chopped vocal sample, thick sub-bass, layered drums, and multiple melodic loops compete for space in the mix. The atmosphere is urban and hypnotic.

This is a progressive metal track with a complex, dense arrangement. Polyrhythmic drum patterns, extended-range guitar riffs, and layered synthesizers create a dense wall of sound. The atmosphere is technical and aggressive.
This is an ambient electronic piece. Slowly evolving synthesizer pads fade in and out over a soft drone. There are no drums or rhythmic elements. The atmosphere is peaceful and expansive.

This is a dark ambient track. Deep, resonant drones and dissonant tones create a tense, unsettling atmosphere. Occasional metallic textures and distant reverberant sounds pass through the stereo field.
This is a lo-fi chill ambient track. Warm vinyl crackle overlays soft piano chords, a gentle bass pulse, and distant muffled drums. The atmosphere is cozy and nostalgic.

This is a nature-inspired ambient piece. Synthesized textures mimic the sound of wind, flowing water, and distant birdsong. Soft melodic phrases emerge and dissolve slowly. The atmosphere is serene and organic.
This is a cinematic ambient piece for a space exploration scene. Slow-moving synthesizer pads, subtle sub-bass tones, and distant atmospheric textures create a sense of vast emptiness and wonder.
This is a choral piece for SATB choir. Four vocal sections sing in rich, four-part harmony without instrumental accompaniment. The dynamic range is wide and the atmosphere is sacred and uplifting.
This is a gospel choir recording. A full choir sings with passionate, call-and-response dynamics over organ and piano. The atmosphere is joyful, energetic, and deeply emotive.
This is an a cappella vocal piece with layered harmonies. Multiple vocal tracks create complex choral textures through overlapping melodic lines. The atmosphere is ethereal and hypnotic.

This track features processed vocal samples as the primary melodic element. Pitch-shifted and time-stretched vocal fragments are looped and layered to create a melodic texture over a minimal beat. The atmosphere is ethereal and experimental.

This is an operatic piece featuring a soprano soloist. The voice soars through high-register melodic lines with vibrato and wide dynamic range over sparse piano accompaniment. The atmosphere is dramatic and expressive.

This is a solo drum kit performance. A drummer plays an energetic groove with sharp snare hits, punchy kick drum, and crisp hi-hat patterns. The recording is dry and close-miked, emphasizing the attack of each stroke.
This is a marimba and vibraphone duet. Two mallet percussion instruments play interlocking melodic phrases with bright, sharp attacks and natural resonant decay. The atmosphere is lively and melodic.

This is a fingerstyle bass guitar piece. The player plucks the strings aggressively, producing sharp, percussive attacks and a bright, snappy tone. Short staccato notes define the rhythm as well as the melody.

This is a Brazilian percussion ensemble. Multiple players perform on shakers, pandeiro, agogô, and surdo, creating a layered rhythmic texture with sharp transients and complex polyrhythms. The atmosphere is festive and driving.

This is a staccato string quartet piece. The four string instruments play short, sharp pizzicato notes in tight rhythmic unison, creating a dry, percussive texture with no sustain. The atmosphere is urgent and mechanical.
